title: Nothirium 1.8.9 port
description: A port of a mixin mod Nothirium to 1.8.9.
body:
## Nothirium (1.8.9 Port)
This mod is the port to 1.8.9 of the original mod **Nothirium**, which was made by [Meldexun](https://modrinth.com/user/Meldexun).

The original mod is present at: [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/nothirium) or [GitHub](https://github.com/Meldexun/Nothirium)

Disclamer: i have permission from Meldexun for publishing this port. [Proof](https://discord.com/channels/845472175527559218/977865298906587146/1442149531906080932)

Do not report an issue of this mod to Meldexun. Report it at the provided github "Issues" page.

### About Nothirium

**Nothirium** is a client-side only mod that changes Minecraft's chunk rendering engine to use modern OpenGL which greatly increases performance. This mod is similar to Sodium but this is not a port of Sodium.

### Requirements

This mod requires RenderLib v1.4.5 which i have also ported and is present at: [RenderLib](https://modrinth.com/mod/renderlib-1.8.9-port)
or [Github](https://github.com/my-life-is-bad/RenderLib-1.8.9-port/releases/tag/v1.8.9-1.4.5)
